Off Calendar May-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Continued To Jul-25-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared by zoom for San Francisco Public Administrator.

The court noted that neither a petition for final distribution, nor a petition for approval of a status report has been filed, and questions why Ms. Mannion would file a declaration instead of a status report as ordered. Ms. Mannion stated that she filed a declaration requesting a continuance which is something that she has done in the past in other cases, that this is the first time that the examiner was unwilling to accept it, that she set forth the reasons why they are not ready to close and that she can file a report on status of the estate. Ms. Mannion also stated that they were given the authority to retain an air search firm to track down the heirs in China, that they have made some progress, but they need additional time to pursue their findings and collect genealogical proofs, that she needs to do an heirship petition before she can close and requested 90-days. Status on close of estate is continued to July 25, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Mannion is to have her petition on file one week prior.

Judge: Lydia Villareal. Probate Examiner: Brandon Slykhous. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: S. Phan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2021 Granted Per Written Order
